tailwind.header_cells: px-8 py-6 text-[10px] font-black text-amber-400 uppercase tracking-[0.2em]
tailwind.row: hover:bg-emerald-50/50 transition-all duration-300 border-b border-gray-50 last:border-none
tailwind.numeric: font-black text-emerald-900 bg-emerald-50 px-3 py-1 rounded-lg text-xs tabular-nums
tailwind.pagination: flex items-center gap-2 p-6 border-t border-gray-50

tailwind.container: p-8 bg-white rounded-[2rem] shadow-[0_32px_64px_-10px_rgba(6,78,59,0.1)] border border-gray-100 max-w-[400px] mx-auto
tailwind.title: text-4xl font-black text-[#064e3b] tracking-tighter uppercase mb-4 leading-none
tailwind.description: text-gray-400 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-[9px] leading-relaxed
tailwind.input: w-full px-6 py-4 bg-gray-50 border-2 border-transparent focus:border-emerald-900 rounded-2xl transition-all font-medium text-gray-900 text-sm

tailwind.primary: bg-[#064e3b] text-amber-400 font-black px-10 py-5 rounded-[1.25rem] shadow-2xl shadow-emerald-900/20 hover:bg-emerald-800 transition-all uppercase tracking-widest text-[11px]
tailwind.success: bg-emerald-600 text-white font-black px-10 py-5 rounded-[1.25rem] shadow-2xl transition-all uppercase tracking-widest text-[11px]
tailwind.outline: border-2 border-emerald-900/10 text-emerald-900 font-black px-10 py-5 rounded-[1.25rem] hover:bg-emerald-50 transition-all uppercase tracking-widest text-[11px]
